# Objective
Build a Norway-first AI support agent platform competing with Chatbase, optimized for fastest setup, broad integrations, and GDPR-aligned security.

# Key Requirements
- Target: Norway-based companies (SMBs and enterprises) with customer service needs.
- Primary outcome: fastest possible setup of support agents for new customers.
- Data sources: broad coverage (files, website crawl, Q&A, text snippets, Notion, ticketing, etc.).
- Channels: web widget + help page, plus email, Slack, W... [truncated, 2947 chars total]
Notion source integration (AC5) implemented: /sources/notion, /webhooks/notion, /sources/notion/sync-check. 8 new tests, 37 total pass. Build passes. Commit 40a1261.

GDPR vector chunk deletion (AC7): added deleteBySourceId/deleteByAgentId to vector store, wired into GDPR deletion endpoint with deleteVectorData flag, wired into DELETE /sources/:id. 6 new tests, 43 total pass. Build clean. Commit e8f2835.
Retrain logic implemented: auto-re-ingestion from cached content with job fallback. Citation enrichment confirmed already complete. 62 tests pass, build clean. Remaining: Stripe action task.
Stripe SDK interface complete: resource-namespaced API (invoices, subscriptions, refunds, customers), StripeError class, 28 new tests (90 total), build clean. All 7 acceptance criteria now met.

All 7 acceptance criteria met. All 11 concrete tasks implemented. 93 tests passing, build clean. MVP complete with in-memory stores, bag-of-words embeddings, simulated integrations — ready for production upgrades.

## Reason
completed

## Status
All tasks completed successfully.

## Summary
- Iterations: 6
- Duration: 47m 21s
- Exit code: 0
